title: hieracium brachiatum subsp. villarsii
intro: Hieracium brachiatum subsp. villarsii is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is commonly known as Villars' hawk's beard. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hieracium brachiatum subsp. villarsii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
